items.title: Girl, 14, shot dead as South Africa's 'taxi wars' hit school
items.dek: Violence has plagued South Africa's highly competitive and lucrative taxi industry for decades.
items.body: Violence has plagued South Africa's highly competitive and lucrative taxi industry for decades.

items.title: Russia says it has handed over 1,000 Ukrainian soldiers' bodies
items.dek: Russia's announcement comes as Ukraine's top negotiator was meeting US peace envoys in Geneva.
items.body: Russia's announcement comes as Ukraine's top negotiator was meeting US peace envoys in Geneva.
